introSection: Dragon Wagon is a roller coaster that is currently travelling with Windy City Amusements.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The entrance of the ride is decorated to look like a castle with faces of jesters with red hats at the bottom of the upper part. In the upper center, there is the green dragon that is on the front of the ride's train and red letters with red lights in them reading the ride's name.

fullText:
Dragon Wagon is a roller coaster that is currently travelling with Windy City Amusements.

The entrance of the ride is decorated to look like a castle with faces of jesters with red hats at the bottom of the upper part. In the upper center, there is the green dragon that is on the front of the ride's train and red letters with red lights in them reading the ride's name.
